zh.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Harington of Farleton於大約1367年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton26歲，母親Isabel English18歲。他於大約1401年4月17日與Lady Margaret Neville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年2月22日在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年74歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾梅林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Harington of Farleton于大约1367年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton26岁，母亲Isabel English18岁。他于大约1401年4月17日与Lady Margaret Neville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年2月22日在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年74岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾梅林。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Harington of Farleton was born about 1367, in Hornby, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, was 26 and his mother, Isabel English, was 18. He married Lady Margaret Neville about 17 April 1401. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 February 1440, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Melling, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Harington of Farleton est né environ 1367, à Hornby, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel English, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Neville environ 17 avril 1401. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 février 1440, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, Unit: Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Harington of Farleton um 1367 in Hornby, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton 26 und seine Mutter Isabel English 18. Er hat um 17. April 1401 Lady Margaret Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1440 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England und wurde in Melling, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Harington of Farleton è nato il circa 1367 nel Hornby, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel English, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Neville circa 17 aprile 1401. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1440, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Melling, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Harington of Farletonが約1367年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビーで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Harington of Farletonは26歳，母Isabel Englishは18歳であった。約1401年4月17日にLady Margaret Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年2月22日にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで74歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアメリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Harington of Farleton(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 랭카실르 호른비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel English(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1401년 4월 17일 Lady Margaret Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 2월 22일 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 멜링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Harington of Farleton nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Hornby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel English, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Neville aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1401. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1440, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Harington of Farleton родился около 1367 г. в местности хаурнби, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel English, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Neville около 17 апреля 1401 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 февраля 1440 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Neville aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1401. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
